claims.text: The harness records every tool call and exit code for 25 tool-use episodes.
The paper does not include a long-horizon task suite beyond 20 minutes.
The run log reports zero parser crashes on the fixture.

review_layers.text: The paper says nothing about parser crashes, so the logging layer may be broken.
evidence: Paper explicitly reports zero parser crashes.
review_layers.next_action: Do not spend the next loop on this criticism.

review_layers.text: The evaluation lacks long-horizon tasks beyond 20 minutes.
evidence: Paper does not include the long-horizon task suite.
review_layers.hidden_assumption: Longer tasks may expose tool-use failures hidden by short episodes.
review_layers.next_action: Run a long-horizon task suite beyond 20 minutes.

review_layers.text: The fixture count is small enough that rare tool failures may be missed.
evidence: Paper evidence is fixture-limited but not contradicted.
review_layers.hidden_assumption: More cases may expose rare failures.
review_layers.next_action: Defer broadening until the primary missing experiment is resolved.

selected_experiment.hypothesis: Run a long-horizon task suite beyond 20 minutes
selected_experiment.keep_condition: measurable improvement or direct support for the target claim
selected_experiment.discard_condition: no measurable support or new regression evidence
selected_experiment.verify: Run a long-horizon task suite beyond 20 minutes.
